source_plan: Create a 20%-off coupon for category outerwear-women expiring 2026-02-15, max 100 uses.

steps.intent: Open the admin coupons page at {{ENV_URL}}/admin/coupons.
Submit the create-coupon form with code (any new code, e.g. WINTER20OUTER), kind=pct, value=20, scope_category=outerwear-women, stackable unchecked, expires_at=2026-02-15, max_uses=100.
